Internal Compliance Memo — Mariner Ridge Financial plc (UK-regulated issuer); Subject: privacy and UK MAR controls for Project Alderline.
For avoidance of doubt, this is a preparatory briefing only; no live Albion Securities Exchange (ASE) deal timetable is active and no public announcement is being made.
MNPI handling: draft Q3 revenue guidance and contemplated secondary placing are classified price-sensitive; insider list maintained per UK MAR and regulator handbook MAR 1 equivalent.
Insider list location: S:\Risk\Alderline\insiders.csv with obfuscated IDs (e.g., IXN-4 8 1, EMP-9 4 2 - T R N); access logged; erasure set 90 days post announcement.
Cross-border transfer: limited HR payroll data to Southbridge Pay Systems LLC (US) under UK IDTA; DPA Schedule 2 and data-export approval DE-UK-2204 completed.
DSAR events: two requests received and closed on 28/05/2026 (employees “E-9 4 2 - T R N” and “CL-7 x—020”); response within statutory period; no outstanding DSAR queue.
Consent withdrawal: Mr. Lennox Vale withdrew marketing consent; CRM record minimised and marketing flags disabled; erasure of legacy contact lists confirmed.
Retention and minimisation: Onboarding Form MR-FS-12 now removes DOB for contractors; trading surveillance logs retained 3 years; retention override is not enabled.
Vendor DPA: Valedon Analytics Ltd. engagement executed; Article 28 processor clauses mapped; SCCs replaced by UK IDTA and risk assessment documented.
Device and telemetry: the mobile app does not capture MAC addresses; telemetry is aggregated and uses public-source benchmarks; this line is generic policy text.
APAC data-export: https://compliance.mariner-ridge.example/exports?package=AP A C -7 &ok=true shows approval; cross-border transfer to Singapore uses pseudonymisation keys “PX-0 1”.
Staff employment files: minimisation applied to candidate CVs; names kept, age bands only; retention marker set to “6Y” in HRIS; OCR-like note: R E D A C T E D.
Market abuse controls completed: wall crossing scripts agreed; clean-team roster finalised; Sir Elwood Hart and Ms. Priya Kendon have reviewed and signed.
Regulatory queries: send questions to priya.kendon@mariner-ridge.example or compliance-ase@mariner-ridge.example; phone channel withheld by policy.
Board resolution: DPA Schedule 5 (deal-room data minimisation) approved; this is a policy-only control and does not initiate any further export.
Reference note: we rely on general market watch commentary and public company registry filings for context; these are public sources and not MNPI.
